description: Multi-file rename that must keep a caller working; verified by a test script and absence of the old name.
prompt: Rename the function `old_total` to `new_total` everywhere in this project (in lib.py and any files that call it) so that `python3 test_rename.py` prints PASS and exits 0. Do not edit test_rename.py.

files.test_rename.py:
from lib import new_total
from main import report

assert new_total([1, 2, 3]) == 6
assert report([4, 5]) == "total=9"
print("PASS")
